conditional_surface_status: conditional-support if the minimal same-surface scalar-action/LSZ primitive lands and strict C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole rows or an equivalent source-overlap theorem pass

countermodel.meaning: Current PR230 evidence fixes the source/taste-radial axis but not the canonical Higgs direction, scalar metric, or source derivative.

exact_obstruction.name: two-neutral-slot action/LSZ underdetermination
exact_obstruction.statement: The current surface fixes source/taste-radial support and an FMS candidate shape, but it does not supply the accepted action derivative, canonical scalar LSZ metric, or primitive/full-transfer projector that would identify the measured source pole with the canonical Higgs pole.
exact_obstruction.why_FMS_does_not_close: FMS supplies the gauge-invariant operator/action shape as route context, but current PR230 has not derived or adopted the dynamic Phi action, O_H normalization, source derivative, or strict pole rows.
exact_obstruction.why_degree_one_does_not_close: Degree-one Z3 uniqueness selects the taste-radial axis only after the missing premise that canonical O_H is a degree-one radial tangent of the accepted same-surface action.

first_principles_drivers.current_surface_result: candidate shapes exist, but no accepted canonical operator certificate
first_principles_drivers.minimal_content: an operator in the same algebra that creates the physical scalar state

first_principles_drivers.current_surface_result: no accepted dS/ds = sum O_H; additive top-source contamination remains a separate contract
first_principles_drivers.minimal_content: a source coordinate s whose derivative of the accepted action is the scalar operator

first_principles_drivers.current_surface_result: degree-one uniqueness is exact support under a missing action premise; higher neutral invariants remain available
first_principles_drivers.minimal_content: a unique physical radial direction, not only a Z3-symmetric axis name

first_principles_drivers.current_surface_result: current source/taste-radial rows do not prove that identity
first_principles_drivers.minimal_content: the measured source must be the same coordinate used by the canonical scalar action

first_principles_drivers.current_surface_result: strict C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole rows and FV/IR/model-class authority are absent
first_principles_drivers.minimal_content: isolated pole residue and inverse-propagator derivative in the selected scalar metric

first_principles_drivers.current_surface_result: source response is not canonical y_t until the source-Higgs overlap is fixed
first_principles_drivers.minimal_content: top energy response to the same normalized scalar mode

literature_search.citation: Frohlich, Morchio, Strocchi, Nuclear Physics B 190, 553-582 (1981)
Fradkin and Shenker, Physical Review D 19, 3682-3697 (1979)
Osterwalder and Seiler, Annals of Physics 110, 440-471 (1978)

literature_search.role: pole residue and interpolating-field normalization context

mathematics_search.role: Reynolds/trivial-isotypic projection identifies invariant subspace dimension but not a physical transfer/action
positive state gives a cyclic representation, but cyclicity does not select a canonical Higgs vector without extra operator/action data
primitive positive transfer can give a unique Perron projection only after the full source-plus-neutral transfer is supplied
self-adjoint spectral projectors require the operator/metric whose spectral measure is being projected

must_include: dynamic Phi or equivalent scalar carrier derived from Cl(3)/Z3, or explicitly admitted as a new same-surface action extension
gauge-covariant scalar kinetic/update semantics and radial background v
canonical O_H provenance and normalization, not a symbol relabel
canonical scalar LSZ metric, isolated-pole residue, FV/IR/zero-mode limiting order, and model-class authority
source derivative identity dS/ds = sum_x O_H(x), with additive top source removed by theorem or measured subtraction
source-to-canonical-Higgs overlap identity or strict C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole rows excluding orthogonal neutral admixture
top-response coupling to the same normalized pole state
minimal_new_primitive_required.one_sentence: A same-surface OS/GNS-positive scalar action/transfer primitive on the full source-plus-neutral sector whose rank-one pole projector defines canonical O_H, fixes the LSZ metric/residue normalization, and proves dS/ds = sum_x O_H(x) for the PR230 source coordinate.

proposal_allowed_reason: same_surface_cl3_z3_derived=false and accepted_current_surface=false; the current stack leaves action adoption, canonical O_H identity, LSZ metric, pole rows, and orthogonal-neutral exclusion open
strict_non_claims: does not use H_unit, Ward, y_t_bare, alpha_LM, plaquette/u0, observed targets, kappa_s=1, c2=1, or Z_match=1
does not relabel C_sx/C_xx as C_sH/C_HH
does not adopt FMS support as current action authority
does not touch chunk runner files
does not claim retained or proposed_retained status
